name: No-Work Salmon Chowder
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Tuna packed in water (7 oz each)
1 package Frozen corn kernels, thawed (10 oz)
2 cans Italian-style stewed tomatoes (14 5/8 oz total)
recipeInstructions:
From "The Monday to Friday Cookbook."
Drain the salmon. Combine it with corn kernels, stewed tomatoes, clam juice, rice, and garlic powder in a medium-size saucepan. Bring to boil over medium heat.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until rice is tender and flavors blend for about 20 minutes. Season to taste with salt and Tabasco.
